IVX HOLDINGS â€” FINAL END-TO-END PRODUCTION QA (RELEASE GATE)

OBJECTIVE

Freeze feature development.

Do not build new features.

Execute the final production QA of the entire IVX platform.

A feature is COMPLETE only if it passes production verification.

Only mark PRODUCTION READY if every critical production module has been verified.
